checks.detail: runtime evidence report evidenceTier = E1; expected E1
3 observation-hook event(s); a launch that produced no instrumentation island observes nothing and proves nothing
every observation event must carry evidenceTier E1 (3 event(s) checked)
0 of 3 event(s) missing bridge-unit / source-revision / runtime-target / adapter / environment linkage
all 5 observed string(s) are absent from the static fixture source; they could only have materialised from a live runtime render
the patched trace re-derives the full UTSUSHI-102 E1 proof (live-DOM, E1 tier, full linkage, observed translation absent from every consumed static input): proven=true
Kaifuu PatchResult status = passed; expected passed

canonical hash of the 5 observed translated unit(s) equals the PatchResult outputHash (sha256:8bfc28f64244432d6f834142c3dece101caae933ba8eb6ef058f2589e9c1b671); the observation reproduces exactly the attested patched output
all 5 observed string(s) differ from their pre-patch sourceText; the observation is the PATCHED translation, not the original
alpha proof manifest proofKind=utsushi.mvmz.runtime_observation_proof runtimeObservationProven=true provenEvidenceTier=E1; expected the UTSUSHI-102 proof proven at E1

alpha proof proved bridge units ["019ed000-0000-7000-8000-bridgeun0001", "019ed000-0000-7000-8000-bridgeun0002", "019ed000-0000-7000-8000-bridgeun0003"]; patched observation covers ["019ed000-0000-7000-8000-bridgeun0001", "019ed000-0000-7000-8000-bridgeun0002", "019ed000-0000-7000-8000-bridgeun0003"]; every alpha unit must be covered post-patch

limitations: Patched-runtime-observation proof re-derives the UTSUSHI-102 E1-vs-static distinction over the patched trace and does not embed raw game bytes or pixels; it names the PatchResult and alpha proof by id/hash only.

The absent-from-static crux guarantees the observed translation was not LIFTED from any consumed static input (patched fixture bytes, PatchResult, alpha proof); an operator who hand-authors the correct translation into a fabricated trace is out of scope, exactly as in UTSUSHI-102. The outputHash provenance link ties the observation to a specific attested patch.
